reviews.comment:
YPF boxes  quede muy descomforne; con  la atención al cliente q ofrece ,;los turnos se deben sacar  x aplicación pero al momento de abonar  el servicio no permiten utilizarla

(Translated by Google)
I was very disappointed with the YPF service station's customer service; appointments are supposed to be made through an app, but when it comes time to pay for the service, they don't allow you to use it.
